videos.title: Everything You Need to Know About Off Road Lighting in 20 Minutes
videos.description:
Your trail doesn't care that you forgot to upgrade your lighting. 
It just gets dark. Really fast. Really far from home.
#JeepLife #RigidIndustries #BajaDesigns

videos.title: Build Agents With SharePoint List Knowledge (Copilot Studio)
videos.description:
In today's video, we are going to use the all-new #CopilotStudio build an agent that's grounded in #SharePoint list knowledge. 

We'll be able to ask our agent question using natural language, and then the agent will send us the results.

And what I love about these new agents is they give super accurate results, even when working with a really large lists.

We are also going to make our agent generate spreadsheets and chat over email. I can't wait to show you. Let's get started.

Table Of Conte

videos.title: Is the junior developer pipeline collapsing? #AI #SoftwareDevelopment #Coding #JobMarket
videos.description:
If you're early in your tech career, you already feel it: the bottom rung of the ladder is disappearing. AI took over exactly the kind of work juniors used to cut their teeth on — which means "I can code" no longer proves what it used to. The pipeline that turned beginners into seniors is quietly collapsing.

So how do you actually break into tech now? I broke down the strategies, success stories, and who's still hiring 👉 https://natesnewsletter.substack.com/p/the-inside-scoop-on-juniors-and-job

videos.title: GLM 5.2 Is Free And Beats Claude On Most Work. So Why Can't Companies Switch?

Full post: https://natesnewsletter.substack.com/p/glm-5-2-context-lock-in?r=1z4sm5&utm_campaign=post&utm_medium=web&showWelcomeOnShare=true

GLM 5.2 is a free, open-source model that often beats Claude on everyday work, yet companies still pay frontier prices. The real bottleneck is no longer the model call. It is the last mile around it: context, routing, and harnesses.

videos.title: How Serious Claude Code Users Get Ahead
videos.description: Out of the box, Claude Code is a powerful tool, but it has four major limitations holding you back. It doesn't know your business context, it stops when you close your laptop, it struggles with large tasks, and it can create problems faster than it solves them. This tutorial shows you how to fix each one, turning Claude Code from a simple chatbot into a powerful system that runs meaningful work for you.
